assets.promptText:
You are generating a single illustration for the LevelChannel SaaS landing
page Variant A "Cinematic Desk Magic". Brand-DNA bible: docs/brand/variant-a-style-anchor.md
(anchorVersion va-1.0). Every output MUST follow ALL constraints below.

PALETTE - hex codes only, no other colours allowed beyond +/-2% lightness drift:
  Canvas backdrop: #0B0B0C
  Secondary surface: #111113
  Accent gradient: linear-gradient(135deg, #C87878 0%, #E8A890 100%)
  Text-tone (when illustrated UI mockup geometry is shown): #F5F5F7 primary, #A1A1AA secondary
  Forbidden: pure white #FFFFFF as fill, pure black #000000, any blue/cold accent,
  any green/red/yellow semantic colour.

LIGHTING - 5-illuminant rig, identical across every asset:
  Key light: top-left, ~30deg pitch, ~45deg azimuth, colour #E8A890, soft large softbox
  Fill: camera-side, very subtle (~10% of key), colour #111113
  Rim: back-right behind subject, narrow, colour #C87878, the "magic glow" separator
  Ambient: omni, ~5%, colour #0B0B0C warm-tint
  Bounce: from desk surface upward, ~3%, colour #111113 warm
  Shadows: soft-edged, warm-tinted, 18-25% opacity max, cast down-and-right.

COMPOSITION:
  Camera: isometric overhead, ~30deg pitch, ~35deg yaw - SAME across all variant-A assets.
  Subject placement: lower-left third intersection (rule-of-thirds).
  Negative space: top-right third reserved for rim-light bleed.
  Items: hand-arranged, NOT grid-aligned; each object +/-3-8deg axis rotation.
  Depth: minimum 3 z-layers (backdrop wash -> subject group -> foreground accent).
  Item cap: <=7 distinct objects per frame (hero overview may show 9 from 7 silhouette families).
  Centre-of-mass: below 60% of frame height; eye rests low, looks up into warm key light.

HARD GUARDRAILS:
  - NO people, NO hands, NO faces, NO body parts. Object storytelling only.
  - NO text characters rendered inside the image. UI mockup surfaces use
    geometric placeholder blocks (rectangles, dots), never letters/words/digits
    other than blob-shape stand-ins. All landing copy is overlaid in HTML.
  - NO watermarks, NO brand logos other than blank placeholder rectangles.
  - NO photoreal photography style - this is stylised illustration with
    subtle hand-touched edge imperfection (4-8% grain on flat fills,
    slight pencil-stroke object outlines).
  - Aspect ratio: as specified in the per-asset prompt. Do not deviate.

OUTPUT: PNG, transparent background NOT required (canvas is #0B0B0C), full
bleed to specified aspect ratio. No frames, no borders, no captions.

PER-ASSET DETAIL:
Wide isometric overhead view of a teacher's chaotic desk surface. Subject group at lower-left third: a smartphone with vague chat-bubble geometry glowing on its screen (no text characters), a printed paper calendar page with X-mark strokes, a spiral-bound notebook with handwritten block-shape strokes (NOT letters), a slim calculator with abstract block geometry in its display, a curled headphones cable, a ceramic coffee cup with faint steam suggestion, two square sticky-notes. Seven silhouette families total (hero may show up to 9 objects from these 7 families). Each item rotated 3-8 degrees off-axis - hand-arranged, never grid-aligned. Warm rim-light leak from back-right hints at off-frame magic glow. Top-right third negative-space reserved for that leak. Soft top-left key light in #E8A890 colour-temperature; cast shadows soft and warm-tinted down-and-right at ~22% opacity. Three z-layers: backdrop wash in #0B0B0C, subject desk group with surface in #111113, foreground gradient-stroke accent leaking from top-right edge.

PER-ASSET DETAIL:
Single-subject illustration: a smartphone resting on a dark desk surface. Phone screen glows with abstract chat-bubble geometry (rounded rectangles stacked vertically, no text characters anywhere). Subject placed at lower-left third intersection; phone rotated 5 degrees off-axis. Soft top-left key light in #E8A890 catches the phone's top bezel. Sharp back-right rim light in #C87878 traces the right edge of the phone and casts a warm halo into the top-right negative space. Desk surface #111113 with subtle bounce. Three z-layers: backdrop wash, phone subject, foreground rim-light leak. Hand-touched grain at 5% on flat fills.

PER-ASSET DETAIL:
Single-subject illustration: a slim handheld calculator on a dark desk surface. Calculator's display shows abstract block geometry (rectangles, no digits). A pencil lies beside the calculator at 7 degrees off-axis. Partial receipt curl in the foreground, gently rolled. Calculator placed at lower-left third intersection. Same 5-illuminant lighting rig: key from top-left in #E8A890, rim from back-right in #C87878. Desk surface #111113. Three z-layers: backdrop, calculator + pencil subject group, foreground receipt curl with rim-light catch. Hand-touched edge imperfection on object outlines, 5% grain on flat fills.

PER-ASSET DETAIL:
Single-subject illustration: a printed paper calendar page covered with X-mark strokes (geometric crossed-stroke shapes, NOT text or numerals), lying on top of an open spiral-bound notebook whose visible page shows handwritten block-shape strokes (rhythmic horizontal lines suggesting writing, never readable letters). A single yellow-tinted sticky-note corner peeks from the upper-right of the notebook. Subject group at lower-left third intersection; calendar rotated 4 degrees, notebook 6 degrees off-axis. Same 5-illuminant lighting: key #E8A890 top-left, rim #C87878 back-right. Three z-layers: backdrop #0B0B0C, notebook + calendar subject, foreground sticky-note + rim-light bleed. 5% grain on fills.

PER-ASSET DETAIL:
Mid-transition illustration: three to four desk items (a calculator, a phone, a sticky-note, a curled receipt) suspended mid-air, frozen in the act of being pulled toward an off-frame attractor at the top-right of the frame. Warm gradient streak-lines (linear-gradient 135deg from #C87878 to #E8A890) trail behind each item, suggesting motion paths converging at the off-frame attractor. The right edge of the frame glows with a faint dashboard-surface hint (#111113 darker slab, subtle accent stroke outline). Subject group at lower-left third; items rotated 5-12 degrees in directions consistent with their motion-streak direction. Same 5-illuminant lighting; rim-light now also acts as the attractor's beacon. Three z-layers: backdrop wash, suspended item group with streak-lines, foreground dashboard-glow leak from right edge.

bleed to specified aspect ratio. No frames, no borders, no captions.

PER-ASSET DETAIL:
Final-frame freeze of the desk-collapse target: an abstract dark dashboard slab in #111113 occupying the centre of the frame, with abstract UI geometry only - a vertical sidebar rectangle on the left edge with 5-6 rounded-rectangle navigation blocks (no text), a main content area with 3-4 stacked card-shape rectangles, a top bar with placeholder circle and rectangle blocks. Warm accent strokes in linear-gradient 135deg from #C87878 to #E8A890 outline 2-3 'active' cells (one sidebar item, one card highlight). Slab placed centred but with centre-of-mass below 60% of frame height; subtle isometric overhead tilt matching the variant-A camera. Faint warm rim-light glow around the slab's perimeter from the back-right key+rim. Backdrop wash #0B0B0C with subtle gradient lift toward top-right. Three z-layers: backdrop, dashboard slab, accent-stroke highlight layer. NO text anywhere; all labels are blank rounded-rectangle placeholders.

PER-ASSET DETAIL:
VIDEO BRIEF (Kling / Sora - manual generation per plan section 11.2 fallback). 6-12 second seamless cinemagraph-style ambient loop based on the same scene as slot_a_hero_desk_overview. Same isometric overhead camera (~30deg pitch, ~35deg yaw). Same 5-illuminant lighting rig (key #E8A890 top-left, rim #C87878 back-right). The desk surface stays static; the motion is ONLY: (1) faint steam rising from the coffee cup with slow upward drift and dissipation, (2) gentle screen-glow pulse on the phone (chat-bubble geometry brightening and dimming at a 4-5 second cycle), (3) subtle idle jitter on the pencil rolling 1-2 degrees back and forth. First frame MUST equal last frame for seamless loop. No camera move, no zoom, no pan. No people. No text. Output: MP4, 1080p or higher, H.264 or HEVC. Owner generates manually via Kling or Sora and saves to the outputPath; Claude picks up the file in Sub-3.
